description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black and orange laptop bag from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag, with lots of space, it will accomodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super funky! Made of nylon for enhanced durability One large roomy main compartment with a detailed organizer on the front Separate chamber for laptop, with a Velcro fastener to make sure it stays put Small zippered pocket above the chamber for storing essentials One zippered pocket  and one pocket with a flap and clasp on the front Brand name with logo printed on the flap Mesh pockets on the sides to hold bottles Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Mesh on the back and straps for better ventilation and breathability Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Brand tab appliqued on the side Haul loop for handling ease Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeHeight: 40 cmWidth: 26 cmDepth: 17 cm
